SELECT value, toUInt128OrZero(value) AS converted_value FROM test_table WHERE converted_value > 100;
SELECT DISTINCT toUInt128OrZero(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value LIKE '1%') AS subquery;
SELECT SUM(toUInt128OrZero(value)) AS total_value FROM test_table;
SELECT t1.value, t2.num, toUInt128OrZero(t1.value) + toUInt128OrZero(t2.num) AS sum_value FROM test_table AS t1 JOIN another_table AS t2 ON t1.value = t2.num;
CREATE VIEW view_test AS SELECT value, toUInt128OrZero(value) AS converted_value FROM test_table WHERE converted_value != 0;
SELECT * FROM view_test ORDER BY converted_value DESC;
